testcase.name: test_empty_name_returns_error

failure.message: AssertionError: Empty name should return error, got 404 assert 404 in [400, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_news_fetching.py:170: in test_empty_name_returns_error assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Empty name should return error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Empty name should return error, got 404 E assert 404 in [400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_whitespace_name_returns_error

failure.message: AssertionError: Whitespace name should return error, got 404 assert 404 in [400, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_news_fetching.py:180: in test_whitespace_name_returns_error assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Whitespace name should return error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Whitespace name should return error, got 404 E assert 404 in [400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
